meta.title: Custom Post Type: Books
meta.description: Blueprint that added a custom post type to playground
meta.author: bph

steps.command:
wp post create --post_type=gbtbooks --post_title='WordPress Styling with Blocks, Patterns, Templates, and Themes' --post_content='

Explore WordPress styling with step-by-step guidance, practical examples, and tips by Tammie Lister

' --post_status=publish
